svg.title: Single Agentic RAG Architecture
svg.desc: Single agent agentic RAG pipeline with planning, retrieval, reranking, criticism, reflection loop, and memory — all running through one agent on a single Pinecone index

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user query enter the single agentic RAG system?')
sendPrompt('What does the Planner do in single agentic RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the Retriever work in single agentic RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the single Pinecone index?')
sendPrompt('How does the Reranker score results in single agentic RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the Critic verify the answer in single agentic RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the Response Generator produce the final answer in single agentic RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does Memory work in single agentic RAG?')
sendPrompt('What tools does the single agentic RAG agent use?')
sendPrompt('How is the single agentic RAG exposed as an API?')
sendPrompt('What does the final answer look like in single agentic RAG?')
